base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of file_select_cursor_link_sprite — a ui from 1986 legend of zelda. Link-shaped cursor — green Link sprite used as arrow-cursor next to selected save-slot. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Link-shaped cursor — green Link sprite used as arrow-cursor next to selected save-slot
